name: NeighbourGuard™

features.title: Emergency Communication
features.text: Emergency alerts via SMS, WhatsApp, and calls

features.title: Tenant Integration
features.text: Integration with tenant registry for efficient response

emphasizes: Appeals to CPF groups, estates, and tenant-watch setups.
No existing use in SA panic button market (unlike Vigilant and Buzzer)
publicDescriptions: This turns every mobile into an emergency response device
This service turns every mobile into an emergency response device, allowing users to send emergency alerts to their contacts and local responders.
This service is designed to enhance personal safety by enabling quick emergency alerts.
It allows users to send alerts via SMS, WhatsApp, and calls to designated responders.
The service is integrated with a tenant registry for efficient emergency response management.
taglines: When your circle become a life saver.
Your personal safety network at your fingertips.
Empowering tenants to respond to emergencies.
